sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشَّاعِرُ يَكْتُبُ قَصَائِدَ عَنِ الطَّبِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnik je pisao pjesme o prirodi.
sentences.translationEn: The poet used to write poems about nature.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَقْرَأُ شِعْرَهُ لِلنَّاسِ فِي السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Čitao je svoju poeziju ljudima na tržnici.
sentences.translationEn: He would read his poetry to the people in the market.

sentences.translation: Ljudi su mu slušali s velikim interesom.
sentences.translationEn: The people listened to him with great interest.

sentences.arabic: حَفِظَ الأَطْفَالُ بَعْضَ الأَبْيَاتِ عَنْ ظَهْرِ قَلْبٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su napamet naučila neke stihove.
sentences.translationEn: The children memorised some verses by heart.
